location.name: Art appraisers in Minneapolis, Minnesota
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Minneapolis, Minnesota.

listedAppraisers.name: Alicia E Weaver
listedAppraisers.description: Alicia E Weaver provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine art (19th–20th century), Americana, Furniture, Ceramics. With Since 2009 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Greg C. Brown
listedAppraisers.description: Greg C. Brown provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Modern/contemporary art, Native American artifacts. With 15+ years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseItNow
listedAppraisers.description: AppraiseItNow provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Personal property, Machinery/equipment. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Revere Auctions
listedAppraisers.description: Revere Auctions provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Regional artists (e.g., George Morrison), Provenance research. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
